description: Labeled retrieval eval set for SecureRAG. ~30 short SOC log entries (corpus) with ~10 query->target pairs. Relevance is exact: a retrieved chunk is relevant iff its id == the query's target id. Several entries per theme act as distractors so Recall@K and MRR are non-trivial.
